Just saw movie , well written, plot was surprising new and fresh.  Action packed , loved all the characters they really fit their parts.  Impressed.  Butler looks good and healthy and did an amazing job on his character in this movie and his cat I loved that he took care of the cat.  His girlfriend was really good too  along with all the other actors each person took pride in their part and gave their all to the movie it appeared they all connected well off screen.  Violent, yeah and quite the heart gasping movie.  Some parts unexpected loved it.   This is a winner.
